## 📝 Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this Pull Request.

Fixes # (issue number)

## 🔧 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code refactoring (internal refactoring, no public API changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] **Unit Tests**: `go test ./...` or `npm run test` passes without errors.
- [ ] **Lint Checks**: `golangci-lint` and `npm run lint` pass successfully.
- [ ] **Manual Verification**: Briefly list the verification steps performed.

## 📷 Screenshots / Screen Recordings (if applicable)
Add visual aids to demonstrate UI/UX changes.

## ✔ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint errors.
